{{Quote|I am CDP One-Thirteen, medical droid, optimized for suspended life process maintenance. You are all intruders here. Prepare to die.|CDP 1-13|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand" />}}
'''CPD 1-13''' was a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] that was assigned to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Medcenter/Legends|medical center]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] where [[Irek Ismaren]] was transformed into a [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]].<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand" />

When [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his companions arrived at the ruined medcenter by accident during their reconnaissance of the conquered [[Planet/Legends|planet]] after Coruscant had fallen to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand" /> in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' to [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].</ref> CPD 1-13 tried to kill them, only to halt his efforts after [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] gave the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] a Bluenek authorization code that she had known from her days as an [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]].<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand" />
